channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How To Bet This Week in College Hoops: Arizona-Houston, Michigan-Duke, More
item.description: Check out what to know about the best games from this week's men's college basketball slate.

item.title: 2026 NFL Mock Draft: Chiefs Give Mahomes Much-Needed Help, Commanders Get Top WR
item.description: With the combine just days away, here how FOX Sports Research currently sees the first round of the 2026 NFL Draft shaking out.

item.title: Kansas Coach Bill Self on Latest Darryn Peterson Exit: 'It's a Concern'
item.description: Kansas head coach Bill Self provided his perspective on star freshman Darryn Peterson checking himself out of another game.

item.title: Dan Hurley: UConnâs Defense âA Jokeâ In Loss To Unranked Creighton
item.description: Dan Hurley was displeased with UConn's effort on defense in his team's 91-84 loss to Creighton on Wednesday.

item.title: 2025 Women's Wooden Award Odds: Sarah Strong Holds Steady as Clear Favorite
item.description: Can any player catch Sarah Strong in the race for the women's Wooden Award? Here are the latest odds.

item.title: What you need to know about college football's next top prospects
item.description: It's recruiting season for the 2027 class. The QB market is wide open while playoff teams are out to flip five-stars.

item.title: Don't be surprised if ... Tyrese Maxey is top points scorer
item.description: Eric Karabell forecasts what to expect from notable players such as Tyrese Maxey, Jayson Tatum and more.

item.title: Is it happening again? Arsenal's stumble in title race follows familiar pattern
item.description: Arsenal's Premier League championship charge suffered yet another wobble on Wednesday, leaving many Gunners fans to wonder: "Is it happening again?"

item.title: 'Shoresy' hits the road with NHL superstars
item.description: The creator of the Hulu hit kept a diary of the live tour. He shares it ahead of the Season 5 U.S. debut.

item.title: Premier League teams look to U.S. to raise transfer funds
item.description: With tighter financial regulations and rules on sponsors, clubs need new ways to raise cash.
